name: Prejean's Barbeque Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the seasoning mix ingredients.
2. In a large skillet over high heat, melt 1 stick of butter and add minced garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and the seasoning mix.
3. Add shrimp (heads removed with shells still on) to the pan. Cook for 2 minutes, shaking the pan.
4. Do not stir. Add chicken stock; cook and shake the pan for 2 minutes.
5. Add beer and cook and shake the pan for an additional minute.
6. Remove from heat and serve in bowls with a lot of French bread to dip into the sauce.
7. It is important to shake the pan back and forth and not stir to blend the sauce well and prevent an oily texture.
